posting.jobTitle: Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning Mechanic Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship and Training Committee (JATC) for Plumbers & Steamfitters, Local Union #7
posting.applicationSummary: Obtain applications in person at Local Union #7 in Latham during the first Thursday of each month, then make sure your application is received by September 1, 2026.
posting.applicationInPersonAddress: Local Union #7, 18 Avis Drive, Latham, NY 12110
posting.applicationHours: 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. on the first Thursday of every month, excluding legal holidays, during the recruitment period.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must be physically able to perform the work required as determined by a physical exam and drug testing after selection and prior to enrollment, at the expense of the sponsor.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or a high school equivalency diploma such as TASC or GED.
Must be physically able to perform the work required as determined by a physical exam and drug testing after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship, at the expense of the sponsor.
Must take and pass the Wonderlic Basic Skills aptitude test and score 50 or higher on the exam to be interviewed.
Must provide DD Form 214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after an offer of employment.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalent, pass the Wonderlic Basic Skills test with a score of 50 or higher for an interview, and be physically able to work with post-selection physical and drug testing.
posting.contactSummary: Contact Plumbers & Steamfitters Local Union #7 at (518) 785-9844 or (518) 785-9808 Ext. 22 for further information.
